# terrible_community_general_spectrum_model_attrs (Data Source)





<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `attributes` (String) A list of attribute names and values to enforce. All values and parameters are case sensitive and must be provided as strings only.
- `host_id` (String) ID of the `terrible_host` to run this data source against
- `name` (String) Model name.
- `type` (String) Model type.
- `url` (String) URL of OneClick server.
- `url_password` (String) OneClick password.
- `url_username` (String) OneClick username.

### Optional

- `use_proxy` (Boolean) If `false`, it does not use a proxy, even if one is defined in an environment variable on the target hosts.
- `validate_certs` (Boolean) Validate SSL certificates. Only change this to `false` if you can guarantee that you are talking to the correct endpoint and there is no man-in-the-middle attack happening.

### Read-Only

- `changed_attrs` (String) Dictionary of changed name or hex IDs (whichever was specified) to their new corresponding values.
- `msg` (String) Informational message on the job result.
